question.content: In right triangle ABC with angle A=90 deg, the perpendicular bisector of BC meets AC at D and AC is extended to E with CE=AB. Find only tan(angle ABC) under the condition AD=(1/3)BD. Answer format requirement: <expr>. Strictly forbidden: any extra text beyond this format.
